metadata.name: Offspring — Flowerfoot Swordmaster creates a 1/1 token copy
metadata.description: Tests the Offspring mechanic (CR 702.175a-b) using Flowerfoot Swordmaster ({W}, Mouse Soldier 1/2, Offspring {2}). P1 casts Flowerfoot Swordmaster paying the base cost {W} plus the offspring additional cost {2}, for a total of {1}{W}. The spell resolves and the creature enters the battlefield. The OffspringTrigger then fires as an ETB triggered ability (CR 702.175b) and is placed on the stack. When the trigger resolves, a 1/1 token copy of Flowerfoot Swordmaster is created on the battlefield. Final state: 2 creatures on p1's battlefield — the original Flowerfoot Swordmaster (1/2) and a 1/1 token copy.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.175a: Offspring is an additional cost keyword. The cast_spell_offspring action with offspring_paid=true causes p1 to pay {2} as an additional cost on top of the base cost {W}. Total mana paid: {W} + {2} = white=1, colorless=2. CR 702.175b: When the creature enters the battlefield, its ETB trigger (OffspringTrigger) fires, creating one 1/1 token copy of the creature. Per CR 702.175b, the token is a copy of the creature except it has base power 1 and base toughness 1. The trigger is placed on the stack after the creature resolves and enters; both players pass priority, then the trigger resolves creating 1 token. Final battlefield count for p1: 2 (1 original 1/2 Flowerfoot Swordmaster + 1 token 1/1 copy). The Valiant ability on Flowerfoot Swordmaster is not exercised in this script (DSL gap — requires TriggerCondition::WhenBecomesTargetOfYourSpellOrAbility). Mana calculation: white=1 (base {W}), colorless=2 (offspring {2}).

script.step_note: P1 casts Flowerfoot Swordmaster with offspring_paid=true, paying {1}{W} total. Spell resolves, OffspringTrigger fires. Trigger resolves creating a 1/1 token copy.

actions.description: Initial: Flowerfoot Swordmaster in p1 hand, battlefield empty, stack empty
actions.note: P1 holds the card and has {1}{W} available: base {W} + offspring additional cost {2}.
CR 702.175a: P1 pays the offspring additional cost {2} on top of the base cost {W}. Total paid: {1}{W}. Card moves from hand to stack.

actions.description: After casting: Flowerfoot Swordmaster on stack, hand empty
actions.note: CR 601.2: Spell on stack awaiting priority passes before resolution.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — top of stack resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Creature spell resolves; Flowerfoot Swordmaster enters the battlefield under p1's control as a 1/2 Mouse Soldier.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Flowerfoot Swordmaster resolves and enters the battlefield. The OffspringTrigger (ETB) sees offspring_paid=true and is placed on the stack.

actions.description: After spell resolves: Flowerfoot Swordmaster on battlefield, OffspringTrigger on stack
actions.note: CR 702.175b: ETB trigger fires and is placed on the stack. CR 603.2: Triggered ability placed on stack after creature entered.
CR 116.3: Both players pass priority — OffspringTrigger resolves.

resolution.note: CR 111.1, 702.175b: Create a token that is a copy of Flowerfoot Swordmaster except it has base power 1 and base toughness 1. Token enters p1's battlefield.

actions.note: CR 702.175b: OffspringTrigger resolves. Create one 1/1 token copy of Flowerfoot Swordmaster. The token is not cast — no cast triggers fire.

actions.description: Final: 2 Flowerfoot Swordmaster on p1's battlefield (1 original 1/2 + 1 token 1/1 copy), stack empty
actions.note: CR 702.175b: offspring_paid=true caused one 1/1 token copy to be created. P1 controls 2 Mouse Soldiers: the original Flowerfoot Swordmaster (1/2) and its 1/1 token copy.
